# Homepage Playbook

## Homepage jobs
- Explain the value proposition fast.
- Build enough trust for users to keep exploring.
- Route different intents into the right next step.
- Surface strong savings opportunities without turning the page into clutter.

## Suggested section logic
- Hero: brand promise, immediate value, clear next action.
- Category routing: help users self-select by shopping intent.
- Featured deals: high-quality opportunities with obvious reasons to click.
- Coupons: easy savings with low cognitive load.
- Footer and trust layer: reinforce legitimacy and breadth without noise.

## Merchandising rules
- Lead with quality and clarity, not raw quantity.
- Use badges, urgency, and discount framing sparingly and honestly.
- Keep section titles informative enough to steer action.
- If a section is weak, improve the content or remove it rather than dressing it up.
